items.title: Jensen Huang says he's found a 'brand new' $200B market for Nvidia
items.summary: The next big thing for Nvidia will be CPUs for AI agents, $200 billion worth, CEO Jensen Huang predicts.

items.title: AMD Ryzen AI Max 400 'Gorgon Halo' packs up to 192GB of unified memory - refreshed APU uses Zen 5 and RDNA 3.5, and can clock up to 5.2 GHz
items.summary: AMD is refreshing its Ryzen AI Max chips with the new 400 series, known as Gorgon Halo, and they'll show up in the Ryzen AI Halo development box. That box, with last-gen Strix Halo chips, is going up for pre-order in June, starting at...

items.title: Eddy Cue named 2026 Cannes Lions Entertainment Person of the Year
items.summary: Apple SVP of Services and Health Eddy Cue has been chosen as this year's recipient of the Entertainment Person of the Year Award, which will be presented next month at the Cannes Lions festival. Here are the details.

items.title: Apple's titanium iPhone experiment may not be over just yet
items.summary: Apple may be working on a way to make titanium iPhones run cooler. (via Cult of Mac - Your source for the latest Apple news, rumors, analysis, reviews, how-tos and deals. )

items.title: The SpaceX IPO filing is filled with AI bets, Starship dreams, and Elon Musk at the center
items.summary: SpaceX has finally made the contents of its IPO filing public, weeks ahead of what is expected to be the largest IPO ever and one that will make Musk the CEO, CTO, and Chairman of the board.

items.title: Apple lets Fortnite back on the App Store, but the fight isn't over yet
items.summary: Fortnite's global App Store comeback marks a major moment for Epic Games, but the legal dispute is still unresolved. (via Cult of Mac - Your source for the latest Apple news, rumors, analysis, reviews, how-tos and deals. )

items.title: The Outsiders celebrates Apple Design Awards 2026 nomination with biggest update yet
items.summary: Just days after being nominated for a 2026 Apple Design Award in the Interaction category, The Outsiders rolled out a major update with Home Screen widgets, expanded workout import options, new metrics, additional workout types, and more....

items.title: xAI burned $6.4B last year - SpaceX's IPO filing shows why the spending is far from over
items.summary: SpaceX's IPO filing reveals xAI lost $6.4 billion in 2025 while planning a massive Grok expansion - offering the first public look at Elon Musk's AI financials and more details about his ambitions.

items.title: NVIDIA Announces Financial Results for First Quarter Fiscal 2027
items.summary: NVIDIA (NASDAQ: NVDA) today reported record revenue for the first quarter ended April 26, 2026, of $81.6 billion, up 20% from the previous quarter and up 85% from a year ago.

items.title: Training-Free BLE Beacon Detection of Freight Wagon Direction at Railway Control Points
items.summary: New research proposes a low-infrastructure way to detect whether a freight wagon has entered or exited a station control point using Bluetooth Low Energy RSSI signals. The system uses Eddystone-TLM BLE beacons mounted on wagon bodies and...
